hero.subline: Programming Instructor with a strong focus on Flutter development, problem solving, and practical programming education. Combines technical depth with mentoring, leadership, and experience supporting learners across multiple age groups.

coach.name: Yusuf Harby
coach.role: Software Engineer | Flutter Developer | Programming Instructor
snapshot: Programming instructor with a strong focus on Flutter development and practical learning
Strong background in C++, Python, Java, software engineering, and data structures & algorithms
Leader of the ICPC Benha Community with mentoring and training experience
Experienced in teaching programming, computational thinking, Scratch, MIT App Inventor, and beginner-friendly development tracks
Combines technical instruction, competitive programming, and community leadership
achievements: Works as Technical Operator at Coach Academy, supporting programming course operations
Programming Instructor with experience teaching Python, Scratch, MIT App Inventor, Pictoblox, Flutter, and LEGO Spike
Leader of the ICPC Benha Community and active CP Coach for student training
Rated Specialist on Codeforces with 1500+ solved algorithmic problems
Qualified to ECPC 2024 and secured 31st place in the ECPC 2024 qualifications
Awarded Best Team in the Flutter Track BootCamp at GDG On Campus Bootcamp – Benha University
projects: Movie App — team-built movie browsing app with search, favorites, API integration, Hive local storage, loading placeholders, and Jira-based workflow
BMI Calculator — Flutter app for BMI calculation with reusable widgets, clean UI, and organized architecture
Contact App — mobile app for adding, viewing, and editing contacts with splash screen and clean list/grid views
Space App — responsive Flutter application presenting solar system information with animations, reusable widgets, and structured models
Pizza Zone — Java and MySQL desktop application for restaurant pizza orders, admin login, pricing updates, and invoice review

items.q: How can I request Yusuf for coaching or training?
items.a: Use the WhatsApp button to send your training needs. Coach Academy will coordinate the suitable format, schedule, and learning goals.

items.q: What are Yusuf’s main teaching and technical strengths?
items.a: Flutter development, programming fundamentals, problem solving, competitive programming, Python instruction, and practical learner support.

items.q: Does Yusuf have mentoring and community leadership experience?
items.a: Yes. He leads the ICPC Benha Community, coaches students in problem solving, and has taught learners in multiple educational environments.

footer.blurb: Empowering talent through hands-on, industry-aligned tech coaching.
